raw: {"questions":[{"label":"Current footing","name":"What's feeling solid in your role right now, Toby?","description":"Opens with a calm read on where he feels grounded before moving into growth edges.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"anchor","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Visible stretch","name":"Where is your judgment carrying the most weight right now, Toby?","description":"Surfaces the parts of his current scope that already resemble next-level ownership.","purpose":"competency","stage":"anchor","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Named ambition","name":"What kind of design work would make the next step feel real for you?","description":"Gets beyond vague ambition to the specific scope or outcomes he wants next.","purpose":"competency","stage":"aspiration","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":3},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Influence target","name":"Where do you want your influence to reach beyond the design team?","description":"Pushes for a concrete picture of cross-functional impact rather than internal execution.","purpose":"competency","stage":"aspiration","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":3},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Decision boundary","name":"What decisions do you want to own that you don't own today?","description":"Clarifies the specific decision-making scope he wants at the next level.","purpose":"competency","stage":"gap","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":3},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Sponsorship gap","name":"Where does your work still need sponsorship to travel further?","description":"Surfaces where visibility or air cover is missing for his work to have org-level impact.","purpose":"topic","stage":"gap","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Air cover needed","name":"What kind of air cover would let you take a more visible position?","description":"Explores the manager support needed to step into more public strategic ownership.","purpose":"topic","stage":"investment","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":1},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Tradeoff check","name":"What would you need to stop doing to make room for stronger design leadership?","description":"Forces a real trade-off between current execution load and higher-leverage leadership work.","purpose":"competency","stage":"investment","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"First commitment","name":"What is the one growth move you want to make before we meet again?","description":"Closes on a concrete commitment without introducing a new thread.","purpose":"competency","stage":"commitment","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]}]}
